prerequisites: A Chargedesk account with at least one company that has API access enabled.
Your Chargedesk API secret key, found at https://chargedesk.com/connect/api after enabling API access for your company.
The username config field is required and holds the API secret key. The password config field is optional. An optional start_date may be set to limit how far back data is fetched.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic Authentication (API secret key)
authMethods.summary: Chargedesk authenticates with HTTP Basic Authentication. Pass your secret key as the basic auth username (the curl examples use -u YOUR_SECRET_KEY: with a blank password). In this connector, put the secret key in the required username field; the password field maps to the empty basic auth password and is optional.

setupSteps.title: Enable API access and get your secret key
setupSteps.body: Each Chargedesk company has its own secret key and must have API access enabled. Go to https://chargedesk.com/connect/api to turn on API access for your company and copy your secret key.

setupSteps.title: Provide the secret key as the username
setupSteps.body: Enter your Chargedesk API secret key into the required username field. Chargedesk passes the secret key as the HTTP Basic Auth username with a blank password, so leave the optional password field empty unless your setup requires otherwise.

setupSteps.title: Set an optional start date
setupSteps.body: Optionally set start_date to control how far back the connector reads data. Leave it unset to use the default range.
